name: Rent Increase
description: The landlord pushed your housing cost up and your margin shrank overnight.
log_entry: Rent went up again, and the month got tighter before it even started.

name: Roommate Conflict
description: Bills, noise, resentment, and bad timing all landed at once.
log_entry: Your place turned ugly and the month paid for it.

name: Reduced Hours / Layoff
description: Your income lane took a hit and the plan immediately got shakier.
log_entry: Work dried up hard this month.

name: Promotion Window
description: A small opening appeared above you. If your momentum is real, it might matter.

choices.label: Push for scope
choices.description: Take the stretch assignment, chase the visibility, and accept the pressure that comes with it.

choices.label: Bank consistency
choices.description: Keep the month steadier, protect your energy, and turn the opening into a slower credibility win.

log_entry: A promotion window opened if you can capitalize on it.

name: Car Repair
description: One bad sound became one expensive month.
log_entry: Your vehicle demanded money you did not want to spend.

name: Used Car Window
description: A decent mechanic says there is a narrow chance to upgrade smarter than usual.

choices.label: Take the deal
choices.description: Commit to the upgrade and accept the extra pressure.

choices.label: Walk away
choices.description: Keep your current setup and protect your margin.

log_entry: A rare decent used-car deal is on the table for a short time.

name: Scholarship / Help Grant
description: You caught a break that lowers the cost of staying on your education path.
log_entry: You landed help money right when you needed it.

name: Family Emergency
description: Someone close to you needed help and your own month took the hit.

choices.label: Cover it
choices.description: Send money and absorb the hit to your own runway.

choices.label: Set boundary
choices.description: Protect your own month and let the tension settle.

log_entry: Family trouble pulled money and focus out of your month.

name: Burnout Month
description: You kept pushing and your body finally made you feel it.

choices.label: Take real recovery
choices.description: Absorb the short-term career hit and actually let your body recover.

choices.label: Mask it and push
choices.description: Protect the short-term lane and let the crash leak into future months instead.

log_entry: Your body finally called the bluff.

name: Transit Hike
description: Transit got more expensive again and the monthly math shifted under you.
log_entry: Transit fares jumped again.

name: Apprenticeship Opening
description: A rare opening appeared for someone willing to commit to the trades lane.
log_entry: Someone tipped you off to an apprenticeship opening while it was still real.

name: Economic Downturn
description: The whole month gets tighter. Nobody is as generous with hours or opportunity as they were.
log_entry: The wider economy softened and the whole month felt it.

name: Side Hustle Window
description: A clean little money window opened if you can actually take advantage of it.
log_entry: A short side-hustle window put quick money on the table.

name: Social Isolation Slide
description: You kept grinding and the rest of your life started thinning out.
log_entry: The month felt emptier, and your performance started paying for it.

name: Market Correction Shock
description: The market corrected hard this month and punished aggressive exposure.
log_entry: Risk assets took a hit and your aggressive bucket felt it.

name: Roommate Missed the Bill
description: Your roommate came up short and your own month absorbed the shock.
log_entry: A roommate missed their share and your month got uglier fast.

name: Roommate Moves Out
description: The place got quieter, but the rent split got a lot worse.
log_entry: Your roommate bailed, and suddenly the cheap place stopped being cheap.

name: Parent Bailout
description: Family stepped in, but it cost some pride and some future goodwill.
log_entry: Family covered part of the mess, but it used up some of the buffer between you.

name: Parent Boundary
description: The message was clear: staying home without momentum is no longer free.
log_entry: Home is still cheaper than rent, but it no longer feels like unconditional support.

name: Beater Breakdown
description: The cheap car reminded you why it was cheap.
log_entry: The beater broke down and turned access into a problem instead of a benefit.

name: Missed Shift After Breakdown
description: The transport mess spilled into actual lost work.
log_entry: One breakdown turned into a missed shift and a worse month than planned.

name: Financed Car Insurance Spike
description: The financed car kept the access, but the monthly trap just got meaner.
log_entry: Insurance jumped, and now the financed car feels a lot less clever.

name: Credit Limit Review
description: The credit bureau notice makes it clear that your borrowing story is under review.

choices.label: Tighten up
choices.description: Trim the balance and protect your credit story.

choices.label: Coast
choices.description: Protect cash now and accept the credit drag.

log_entry: The bureau review made the month feel a lot less optional.

name: Refinance Window
description: Strong credit cracked open a rare chance to clean up expensive debt terms.

choices.label: Refinance now
choices.description: Swap expensive debt terms for a cleaner monthly lane.

choices.label: Wait
choices.description: Keep your current terms and protect your breathing room.

log_entry: Your credit opened a rare chance to make debt less ugly.

name: Credit Rebuild Window
description: A cleaner few months finally made a real credit-repair lane worth taking seriously.

choices.label: Open the secured line
choices.description: Pay a little now to let consistent behavior rebuild your file month by month.

choices.label: Keep repairing slowly
choices.description: Avoid the extra step and keep rebuilding through ordinary clean months.

log_entry: A legitimate credit repair lane opened because your month stopped looking chaotic.

name: Sales Hot Streak
description: Momentum finally showed up in public and this lane felt alive for once.
log_entry: Sales got hot and, for once, your lane felt like upside instead of pressure.

name: Sales Cold Streak
description: The same volatility that creates upside also creates ugly silent months.
log_entry: Sales went cold and reminded you how thin the floor is in this lane.

name: Vehicle Total Loss
description: The engine finally gave up for good. There is no fixing this one.
log_entry: The engine died. Your car is gone. You are back to transit or worse until you can replace it.

name: Inventory Crunch
description: Receiving missed the mark and the floor is short. The store is about to lean on whoever can absorb the chaos.

choices.label: Cover the floor yourself
choices.description: You save the month for the store, but your body pays for it.

choices.label: Protect the team
choices.description: You reset expectations, keep people from snapping, and give back some momentum.

log_entry: Operations pressure landed in your lap.

name: Big Ticket Month
description: A rare customer window opened. If you press it right, this month can pay differently.

choices.label: Push the close
choices.description: You squeeze the month for upside and take the pressure with it.

choices.label: Play the long game
choices.description: You bank the relationship instead of maxing the month.

log_entry: A sales-heavy month gave you a real choice between upside and stability.

name: Client Book Referral
description: A steady customer started feeding you repeat business and reputation instead of just random volume.
log_entry: Your relationship lane paid off this month.

name: Dock Bottleneck
description: A bad inbound wave jammed the floor. Leadership has to decide whether to brute-force it or protect the team.

choices.label: Stay late and clear it
choices.description: You save the dock but the month gets heavier.

choices.label: Run a safer shift
choices.description: You protect your people and accept a smaller career push.

name: Dispatch Route Rewrite

choices.description: You reduce pressure now, but it feels like conceding the run.

choices.label: Protect the floor

name: Cash Drag Regret

choices.label: Stay defensive
choices.description: Keep resilience high even if upside lags.

choices.label: Tilt into upside
choices.description: Shift toward growth and accept higher future volatility.

name: Steady Compound Window
description: Balanced execution opened a clean compounding decision: lock in systematic gains or keep more short-term flexibility.

choices.label: Automate compounding
choices.description: Commit part of this month to steady compounding and accept less immediate flexibility.

choices.label: Keep flexibility
choices.description: Hold more cash liquidity and skip some compounding this cycle.

name: Reserve Deployment Window
description: Housing pressure is live, but your liquidity plan still gives you a choice: spend real buffer now to buy runway, or protect reserves and keep the squeeze active.

choices.label: Spend buffer now
choices.description: Use real reserves to keep the housing lane from tightening further.

choices.label: Keep buffer locked
choices.description: Protect reserves and accept that the lease squeeze stays live.

name: Family Stability Surge
description: Strong support and a clean month opened a chance to turn stability into durable momentum.

choices.label: Press for upside
choices.description: Use the stable base to push harder this month.

name: Emergency Fund Redeployment

name: Lease Default Warning

name: Lease Enforcement Notice

choices.label: Plan downgrade

name: Debt Fee Stack
description: Small misses stacked into penalties that now tax every month.
